overview: DVR and Dr. HS MIC College of Technology (also known as MIC College of Technology), established in 2002, is a premier autonomous engineering institution located in Kanchikacherla, near Vijayawada. Founded by the Devineni Venkata Ramana & Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC Trust, the college has grown into a hub for technical and management education in the NTR District of Andhra Pradesh. It is known for its discipline-centric academic environment and strong focus on student employability through industry-aligned training.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. NBA accredited for B.Tech in CSE, ECE, and ME. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with JNTU-Kakinada. ISO 9001:2015 certified.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, IT, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 50% in PCM + AP EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank
Graduation with Maths at 10+2 or Degree level + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI, Machine Design, Power Electronics)

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats are under the Convener Quota (Category A) filled through state-level web counseling based on entrance exam ranks. The remaining 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit. Counseling Code: MICM.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: July–August 2026.

facilities: Modern Engineering Labs with high-end equipment
Central Library with 50,000+ volumes and Digital Section
Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls with Wi-Fi
Transport Facility (Fleet of 45+ buses covering Vijayawada and outskirts)
campus.specialNote: The college hosts 'Aagama', a popular national-level annual technical and cultural fest. It also features a dedicated 'Idea Lab' and research centers to encourage student innovation and startup culture.

contact.address: NH 9, Vijayawada - Hyderabad Highway, Kanchikacherla, NTR District, Andhra Pradesh - 521180
